description: This file defines the Popover class for Bootstrap, extending Tooltip, and includes configuration, methods, and jQuery plugin integration for popover UI components.

classes.name: Popover
classes.description: A class extending Tooltip to implement popover UI component with additional content handling and jQuery integration.

methods.name: static get Default
methods.description: Returns the default configuration for the Popover.

methods.name: static get DefaultType
methods.description: Returns the default type configuration for the Popover.

methods.name: static get NAME
methods.description: Returns the name identifier for the Popover component.

methods.name: _isWithContent
methods.description: Checks if the popover has content based on title or content.

methods.name: _getContentForTemplate
methods.description: Prepares content for the popover template, including title and body.

methods.name: _getContent
methods.description: Retrieves the content for the popover, resolving functions if necessary.

methods.name: static jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery plugin interface for the Popover component.
